holdings.infoBox: CGGE is an equity ETF with a total of 125 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 5.09%, Broadcom at 4.56%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 4.04%, CAPITAL GROUP CENTRAL CASH FUN CAPITAL GROUP CNTRL CSH M at 3.26%, and Microsoft at 3.20%.

overview.description: The Capital Group Global Equity ETF (CGGE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks total returns by actively managing a portfolio of companies from around the world. CGGE was launched on Jun 25, 2024 and is issued by Capital Group.
